debug_info.goal:
A B C P : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 2)
hABC : AffineIndependent ℝ ![A, B, C]
hP : P ∈ interior ((convexHull ℝ) {A, B, C})
⊢ EuclideanGeometry.angle P A B ≤ Real.pi / 6 ∨
    EuclideanGeometry.angle P B C ≤ Real.pi / 6 ∨ EuclideanGeometry.angle P C A ≤ Real.pi / 6

failed_attempts:
by_contra h_contra
  push_neg at h_contra
  obtain ⟨h1, h2, h3⟩ := h_contra
  have hpos := sub_angles_pos A B C P hABC hP
  have hsum6 := six_angles_sum A B C P hABC hP
  have hceva := trig_ceva A B C P hABC hP
  have hcomp_lt : ∠ P A C + ∠ P B A + ∠ P C B < π / 2 := by linarith
  have hlt1 : ∠ P A B < 5 * π / 6 := by
    by_contra h; push_neg at h; linarith [hpos.2.1, hpos.2.2.1, hpos.2.2.2.2]
  have hlt2 : ∠ P B C < 5 * π / 6 := by
    by_contra h; push_neg at h; linarith [hpos.2.1, hpos.2.2.1, hpos.2.2.2.2]
  have hlt3 : ∠ P C A < 5 * π / 6 := by
    by_contra h; push_neg at h; linarith [hpos.2.1, hpos.2.2.1, hpos.2.2.2.2]
  have hs1 := sin_gt_half _ h1 hlt1
  have hs2 := sin_gt_half _ h2 hlt2
  have hs3 := sin_gt_half _ h3 hlt3
  have hprod_gt : Real.sin (∠ P A B) * Real.sin (∠ P B C) * Real.sin (∠ P C A) > 1 / 8 := by
    calc Real.sin (∠ P A B) * Real.sin (∠ P B C) * Real.sin (∠ P C A)
        > 1 / 2 * (1 / 2) * (1 / 2) := by
          apply mul_lt_mul_of_pos_right
          · exact mul_lt_mul_of_pos_right hs1 (by linarith)
          · linarith
      _ = 1 / 8 := by ring
  have hprod_lt := sin_prod_lt _ _ _ hpos.2.1 hpos.2.2.1 hpos.2.2.2.2 hcomp_lt
  linarith
